instruction: Help me record the product sales data

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Product'
ws['B1'] = 'Unit Price(CNY)'
ws['C1'] = 'Sales(pcs)'
ws['D1'] = 'Return Rate(%)'
ws['A2'] = 'Ultra-thin Laptop'
ws['B2'] = 4999
ws['C2'] = 320
ws['D2'] = 1.2
ws['A3'] = 'Wireless Mouse'
ws['B3'] = 129
ws['C3'] = 1850
ws['D3'] = 0.8
ws['A4'] = 'Mechanical Keyboard'
ws['B4'] = 399
ws['C4'] = 680
ws['D4'] = 2.1
ws['A5'] = 'Monitor'
ws['B5'] = 1299
ws['C5'] = 410
ws['D5'] = 1.5
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/product_sales.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me record the product sales data
Find the product with the lowest return rate from /home/user/Desktop/product_sales.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/product_summary.txt: 'Lowest Return Rate Product: Wireless Mouse (0.8%)', save

include: Lowest Return Rate Product: Wireless Mouse (0.8%)
